title: Build an HTML Music Player
description: A simple music player page built using the HTML audio element. Three songs by Quincy Larson are listed, each with a title heading, artist paragraph, and a native browser audio player with loop and controls enabled — no JavaScript required.
objectives: Use the audio element to embed playable audio
Set the src attribute to point to a hosted audio file
Enable browser playback controls with the controls attribute
Use the loop attribute to repeat audio automatically
Repeat a consistent pattern of elements for multiple items
